nasb.text: But You know me, O Lord; You see me; And You examine my heart’s attitude toward You. Drag them off like sheep for the slaughter And set them apart for a day of carnage!

esv.text: But you, O Lord, know me; you see me, and test my heart toward you. Pull them out like sheep for the slaughter, and set them apart for the day of slaughter.

cnv.text: 但耶和華啊！你認識我，了解我， 你察驗了我對你的心意。 求你把他們拉出來，好像將宰的羊一般； 求你把他們分別出來，留待宰殺的日子。

ccb.text: 但耶和华啊，你认识我，了解我， 察验我的内心。 求你拖走他们， 就像拖走待宰的羊， 留到宰杀之日。
